preregistration: this file, committed before any generation (record-first). Owner redirect (17-Jul, in-session): instead of a paid arbitration re-run of the bs-iter2 judge-fragile verdict (#224 Stage 1 output, PR #227), author an evidence-based iteration-3 revision and measure whether it is unambiguously better. Standing owner spend approval (17-Jul) recorded in session; ADR 0076 estimate discipline applies.
hypothesis: Neutral (ADR 0059): the iter-3 building-skills revision (5 diagnosis-backed edits funded by muda cuts, net +3 body codepoints) may or may not improve graded output versus the current body at matched cost. Bar: ADR 0027 merge bar on diff = d_new - d_old (directional primary, CI confidence signal, cost prong via body chars_delta = +3 ~ flat). 'Unambiguously better' target pre-registered as: MERGE with diff CI excluding 0 under BOTH judge families; anything less is recorded as its measured grade. A null or regression is a valid outcome and reverts the draft.
diagnosis_basis: 90 graded cells across 2026-07-08-skills-hermetic + 2026-07-09-three-skills-remeasure + bs-iter2 raw-output re-analysis (agent report, 18-Jul): top failure classes = exact-opener misses, cut-means-relocate, emoji-mechanism absence, authority-pressure compliance, single-clause descriptions. Edits target classes generally; difficulty-tuning toward graders is forbidden (ADR 0024).

arms.without: hermetic claude -p sonnet, ALL tools denied, neutral cwd, no skill content
arms.with-new: without + --append-system-prompt = treatments/building-skills.with-new.txt (iter-3 draft body, frontmatter stripped)

grid: 6 evals x 3 arms x 3 reps = 54 cells; evals = skills/building-skills/evals/evals.json verbatim (untouched by the draft)

prescreen.rule: 1 without rep per eval BEFORE any treatment cell (ADR 0065); bare frac_met >= 0.85 = saturated -> harden/drop recorded here; 0.0 floor flagged; <2 discriminating evals = STOP and record

pilot.rule: 2 with-new cells on E1 before the grid; projection > ceiling = STOP for re-approval (ADR 0073)

judging: grok headline + claude divergence on identical cells (rubric.skill_grade_prompt per-expectation, #214 pattern); a cross-judge verdict flip = exploratory, no MERGE promotion
metrics: per (eval, arm) mean fraction-met over reps; d_old = with-old - without, d_new = with-new - without, diff = d_new - d_old; eval-clustered mean + 95% CI; merge_verdict (shared lib, ADR 0027 amended bar) with chars_delta = +3 body codepoints

cost.estimate_basis: ADR 0076 derived priors: 2026-07-17-code-standards-remeasure actuals (same sonnet tool-denied text-eval shape) — generation bare $0.24/cell, with $0.28-0.32/cell; judges claude $0.088/cell, grok notional $0.046/cell

sample_rule.rule: every cell record committed under prescreen-outputs/, pilot-outputs/, outputs/; treatments/ committed; population appended post-run
